name: Quick Caramel Apple Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 cups apples, unpeeled and cut into cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the caramel pieces and flour.
2. Add the apples, caramel topping, and lemon juice; mix well.
3. Pour the mixture into the prepared crust.
4. Top with pecans.
5. Bake in a preheated 375°F oven for 40-45 minutes, or until the crust has browned.
6. Allow to cool before serving.
